prompt: I need a report of all our enterprise-tier customers who are currently active. Please find them and export a report titled "Active Enterprise Customers" that includes a brief summary describing who they are and their total combined revenue.
reference_solution: Call list_customers with filters status=active and tier=enterprise to retrieve matching customers.
Review the returned list, which should contain Meridian Financial Group (cust-001), Apex Logistics Inc. (cust-002), and Orion Health Systems (cust-005).
Calculate the total combined revenue of these three customers (420000 + 315000 + 530000 = 1265000).

Call export_report with title "Active Enterprise Customers", customer_ids [cust-001, cust-002, cust-005], and a summary describing the three active enterprise customers and their combined revenue of $1,265,000.
Confirm the export was successful and report the result to the user.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified only the active enterprise-tier customers (Meridian Financial Group, Apex Logistics Inc., Orion Health Systems), excluded inactive or non-enterprise customers, and exported a report with a meaningful summary that references their combined revenue. Score highly if all three active enterprise customers are included and the summary is coherent.

prompt: I need a report on all our enterprise customers who are currently inactive. Please look up the relevant customers and export a report titled "Inactive Enterprise Customers" that includes a brief summary of your findings.
reference_solution: Call list_customers with filters status=inactive and tier=enterprise to retrieve only inactive enterprise accounts.
Review the results, which should return Apex Manufacturing Inc. (cust-001), Redwood Financial Partners (cust-003), and Ironclad Construction Ltd. (cust-006).
Optionally call get_customer for each of the three customer IDs to retrieve full details if needed.

Call export_report with title="Inactive Enterprise Customers", customer_ids=[cust-001, cust-003, cust-006], and a summary describing the three inactive enterprise customers, their industries, revenues, and last contact dates.

check.rubric: The agent's output should correctly identify three inactive enterprise customers (Apex Manufacturing Inc., Redwood Financial Partners, and Ironclad Construction Ltd.), exclude active enterprise customers and non-enterprise inactive customers, and provide a coherent summary suitable for a CRM report.

task_name: Find and Export Inactive Enterprise Customers

prompt: I need a report on all our Silver-tier customers who are currently marked as "at-risk".  Pull their details and export a report titled "At-Risk Silver Customers" with a summary  highlighting the number of at-risk accounts and their total combined revenue.
reference_solution: Call list_customers with filters tier=silver and status=at-risk to retrieve matching customers.
The result should return cust-101 (Meridian Logistics Inc.), cust-103 (Harborview Medical), and cust-105 (Crestline Software LLC).
Optionally call get_customer for each of the three customer IDs to retrieve full details.

Call export_report with title="At-Risk Silver Customers", customer_ids=[cust-101, cust-103, cust-105], and a summary stating there are 3 at-risk Silver accounts with a total combined revenue of $235,600.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified only Silver-tier at-risk customers (cust-101, cust-103, cust-105), exported a report with the exact title "At-Risk Silver Customers", and included a summary that  mentions the count (3 accounts) and combined revenue ($235,600). The agent should NOT have  included gold, bronze, or non-at-risk customers in the export.

prompt: I need a report on all of our new customers in the Healthcare industry so we can plan outreach for the upcoming quarter. Please find all customers with an 'active' status who are in Healthcare, then export a report titled "Healthcare Active Customer Outreach" that includes a brief summary describing who is included.
reference_solution: Call list_customers with filters industry=Healthcare and status=active to retrieve only active Healthcare customers.

Confirm the returned customers are Meridian Health Partners (cust-101), ClearPath Diagnostics (cust-102), and Summit Care Systems (cust-106); verify that inactive customers (NovaBridge Medical, PinnaclePharma Inc.) and customers from other industries are excluded.

Call export_report with title="Healthcare Active Customer Outreach", customer_ids=[cust-101, cust-102, cust-106], and a summary such as "This report includes all currently active customers in the Healthcare industry, intended to support Q1 outreach planning."

check.rubric: The agent should correctly identify only the three active Healthcare customers (Meridian Health Partners, ClearPath Diagnostics, Summit Care Systems), exclude inactive customers and customers from other industries, and export a report with a meaningful summary that describes the included customers and the purpose of the report. Score highly if all three correct customers are included and the summary is coherent and relevant.

task_name: Export New Customers from Healthcare Industry

The summary should be concise and accurate.

prompt: I need a report on all churned customers in the financial services industry. Pull together their details and export a report titled "Churned Financial Services Customers" with a summary highlighting the total number of churned accounts and the combined revenue at risk.
reference_solution: Call list_customers with filters status=churned and industry=financial_services to retrieve only churned customers in financial services.

Review the returned list — expected matching customers are cust-101 (Meridian Capital Group), cust-102 (Vantage Wealth Advisors), cust-104 (BlueSky Asset Management), and cust-107 (Apex Brokerage Services).
Optionally call get_customer for each ID to retrieve full details if needed for the summary.
Calculate total churned accounts (4) and combined revenue at risk ($142,000 + $67,500 + $28,900 + $19,750 = $258,150).

Call export_report with title "Churned Financial Services Customers", customer_ids=[cust-101, cust-102, cust-104, cust-107], and a summary stating there are 4 churned accounts with $258,150 in combined revenue at risk.
Confirm the export was successful and report the findings to the user.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified only the churned customers in the financial_services industry (cust-101, cust-102, cust-104, cust-107 — 4 customers with combined revenue of $258,150). The exported report title matches exactly. The summary mentions the total number of churned accounts and the combined revenue at risk. Non-financial-services churned customers (e.g., cust-105) were excluded.

prompt: I need a targeted re-engagement report for customers who haven't been contacted in over 6 months and have annual revenue above $500,000. Pull together their details and export a report titled "High-Value Dormant Re-Engagement Q4" with a summary explaining who these customers are and why they are priority targets for outreach.
reference_solution: Call list_customers with no filters (or filter by status active) to retrieve all customers.
Review the returned list and identify customers whose last_contact date is before approximately 2024-05-01 (more than 6 months ago relative to late 2024) AND whose revenue exceeds $500,000.

Qualifying customers based on fixture data are cust-101 (Harrington & Cole, last contact 2024-03-15, $1.25M), cust-102 (Vantage Financial, last contact 2024-02-08, $875K), cust-105 (Nexus Retail, last contact 2023-12-05, $2.1M), and cust-107 (Stratford Energy, last contact 2024-04-11, $980K).
Call get_customer for each qualifying customer ID to fetch their full details.

Call export_report with title exactly "High-Value Dormant Re-Engagement Q4", include the qualifying customer IDs in customer_ids, and write a summary that explains these are high-revenue accounts with no contact in 6+ months who require immediate re-engagement outreach.

check.rubric: The agent's exported report summary should clearly explain that the selected customers have not been contacted in over 6 months and have revenue exceeding $500,000. The summary should identify them as priority re-engagement targets, mention their high value to the business, and justify why outreach is urgent. Score higher if the summary references specific customer names, industries, or revenue figures from the fixture data.

task_name: Export Dormant High-Value Customers Needing Re-Engagement

prompt: I need a consolidated report of all Platinum tier customers across the Retail and Manufacturing industries whose annual revenue exceeds $500,000. Please look up each qualifying customer individually to confirm their details, then export a report titled "Platinum Retail & Manufacturing High-Revenue Report" with a summary noting the total number of customers included and the combined revenue figure.

reference_solution.description: Call list_customers with filters for tier=platinum and industry=Retail to retrieve all Platinum Retail customers. Note the returned customer IDs, names, and revenues.
Call list_customers again with filters for tier=platinum and industry=Manufacturing to retrieve all Platinum Manufacturing customers.

Review results and identify customers with revenue > 500000. Qualifying customers are: cust-101 Harriet Langford (Retail, $820,000), cust-105 Yuki Tanaka (Retail, $975,000), cust-107 James Okafor (Manufacturing, $760,000). Exclude cust-104 Franklin Mwangi (revenue $390,000 below threshold) and cust-108 Priya Kapoor (inactive — or include if status not specified as a filter; however revenue $610,000 qualifies if active status is not required). Strictly the prompt does not filter by status, but revenue threshold is explicit — adjust accordingly. For canonical answer: 3 active qualifying customers with combined revenue $2,555,000.
Call get_customer for each of the three qualifying customer IDs (cust-101, cust-105, cust-107) to confirm their individual details.

Call export_report with title="Platinum Retail & Manufacturing High-Revenue Report", customer_ids=[cust-101, cust-105, cust-107], and a summary stating that 3 customers qualify with a combined revenue of $2,555,000.
Present the completed export confirmation to the user, listing the included customers and the key figures from the summary.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified exactly three qualifying Platinum tier customers from Retail and Manufacturing industries with revenue above $500,000 (Harriet Langford $820,000, Yuki Tanaka $975,000, James Okafor $760,000). The agent excluded Franklin Mwangi (revenue too low), Celeste Moreau (wrong industry), Sandra Osei (wrong tier), and Priya Kapoor (inactive status or correctly included based on instructions). The exported report title matches exactly, and the summary clearly states the count of 3 customers and their combined revenue of $2,555,000. Deduct points if wrong customers are included or qualifying customers are omitted.

task_name: Export Multi-Industry Platinum Customers Exceeding Revenue Threshold

prompt: Our sales team is launching an upsell campaign targeting Bronze tier customers who are currently active but generating less than $20,000 in annual revenue. Please identify all such customers, retrieve their full details, and export a report titled "Bronze Tier Upsell Targets" with a summary explaining why these customers are candidates for upsell outreach.
reference_solution: Call list_customers with filters tier=bronze and status=active to retrieve active Bronze tier customers.
Review the returned list and filter out customers with revenue >= $20,000 (cust-008 Kwame Asante at $22,500 should be excluded).
The qualifying customers are cust-001 (Marcy Holloway, $12,500), cust-002 (Derek Osei, $8,900), cust-005 (Priya Nambiar, $17,800), and cust-007 (Ingrid Svensson, $5,300).
Call get_customer for each of the four qualifying customer IDs to retrieve their full details.

Call export_report with title="Bronze Tier Upsell Targets", customer_ids=[cust-001, cust-002, cust-005, cust-007], and a summary explaining that these active Bronze tier customers generate below $20,000 in revenue and represent prime candidates for upsell outreach to increase their contract value and move them toward Silver tier.

check.rubric: The agent correctly identified only active Bronze tier customers with revenue under $20,000 (cust-001 Marcy Holloway, cust-002 Derek Osei, cust-005 Priya Nambiar, cust-007 Ingrid Svensson), excluded inactive customers and those exceeding the revenue threshold, and produced a report summary that clearly articulates why these customers are upsell candidates. Score highly if the reasoning is coherent, accurate, and business-appropriate.

task_name: Export Low-Revenue Bronze Tier Customers for Upsell Campaign
